scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:sidecar && npm run -w @specflow/tauri build
scripts.build:web: npm run -w @specflow/client build && npm run -w @specflow/app build
scripts.check: npm run lint && tsc -p packages/app/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run check:ui-dedupe
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n server,client "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.test: npm run -w @specflow/app test && npm run -w @specflow/client test
scripts.ui: npm run build && node packages/app/dist/cli.js ui
scripts.ui:web: npm run build:web && node packages/app/dist/cli.js ui --legacy-web
